title: Add AgentState, AgentObservation, PlanAdjustment, ProactiveSuggestion types + extend SessionMode for autonomous
context_files: src/lib/interpreter/types.ts (existing type patterns; add autonomous types alongside existing Agent* types)
acceptance_criteria: AgentObservation type exported: stepResult (ToolResult), assessment (string), needsAdjustment (boolean), adjustment? (string)
PlanAdjustment type exported: originalPlan (AgentPlan), adjustedPlan (AgentPlan), reason (string)
ProactiveSuggestion type exported: id, text, confidence (number), source ('context'|'history'|'learning'|'ambient')
AutonomousAgentResult type exported (extends AgentResult with observations, adjustments)
deliverables: src/lib/interpreter/types.ts (modified: add 5 autonomous types + extend SessionMode)
